payload.mechanism: Static longshot buy baseline/control (not a novel claim).
Fixed-clock interaction: near kickoff, high YES prices overstate win chance; buy NO at executable NO ask and hold to settlement.
T-6h underdogs in a moderate band are underpriced relative to settlement frequency (clock x price, not static all-clock bucket).

gates.name: capacity_events
gates.reason: capacity_unavailable_or_zero; dense books required for research_ready

payload.mechanism: Cold-start / short listing age markets with extreme favorites are miscalibrated before informed flow arrives.
Steep pregame YES mid run-up measured strictly before T-60m reverts by settlement.
Steep pregame YES mid run-up continues into settlement (opposite of reversion).
Large T-6h→T-60m probability lift that remains at T-15m is late overreaction; fade YES into settlement.

inference_contract.fdr: BH on p_joint novel family alpha=0.05

payload.mechanism: Tight-spread favorites at T-60m are better calibrated / executable than wide-spread favorites; selective long favorite when friction is low.
Negative control: buy YES after path selloff without theory support.
Negative control: almost always buy YES at T-60m.
